ddls:
CREATE TABLE "learners" (
  "learner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each learner */,
  "learner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the learner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the learner */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the learner enrolled in the LMS */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the learner (e.g., student, teacher, admin) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the learner */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the learner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the learner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the learner */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the learner */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the learner (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("learner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learners_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "learning_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each learning session */,
  "learner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learner participating in the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "total_steps" INTEGER /* Total number of steps taken during the session */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course associated with the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., self-study, group study, live session) */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used for the session (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the session was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_sessions_learner_id FOREIGN KEY ("learner_id") REFERENCES learners ("learner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "learner_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the step belongs to */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Number of the step in the session */,
  "sites_visited" INTEGER /* Number of sites visited during the step */,
  "return_rate" REAL /* Probability of returning to a previous step */,
  "failure_rate" REAL /* Probability of failing the step */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Probability of successfully completing the step */,
  "random_number" REAL /* Random number generated for the step */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the learner during the step */,
  "time_spent" INTEGER /* Time spent on the step in seconds */,
  "step_status" TEXT /* Status of the step (e.g., completed, skipped, failed) */,
  "assessment_score" REAL /* Score if the step involves an assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learner_steps_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES learning_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the site (e.g., course, resource, quiz) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the site for direct access */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the site */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the site was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the site was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES learners ("learner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "learner_site_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site visit */,
  "learner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learner visiting the site */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site being visited */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the visit in minutes */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., initial visit, revisit) */,
  "visit_status" TEXT /* Status of the visit (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "content_consumed" TEXT /* Content consumed during the visit */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the learner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learner_site_visits_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learner_site_visits_learner_id FOREIGN KEY ("learner_id") REFERENCES learners ("learner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES learners ("learner_id")
)
